prompt: A surreal network of human figures arranged in a circular composition, a single central figure connected to several surrounding figures, each surrounding figure is connected to many more figures beyond, forming dense expanding clusters, the central figure appears isolated despite being connected, while every surrounding figure appears more socially connected than the center, visualized as glowing threads or organic branching lines between figures, composition emphasizes imbalance and contradiction in connectivity, no text, no numbers, no symbols, no charts, no labels, soft atmospheric lighting, slightly surreal and uncanny mood, minimal background, focus on relational structure and spatial paradox
visual_logic: A central figure has fewer connections than surrounding figures, while each surrounding figure connects to many others, making the center appear less connected despite being part of the network
